subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim to the Most Exalted Shrine! Render thanks unto God that through His supreme bounty and greatest gift thou hast attained unto the honour of visiting the Most Exalted Shrine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مطاف ملا اعلی شکر کن خدا را که بموهبت کبری و عطیه عظمی زیارت مطاف ملا
